title: Better Scaffolding Visibility
description: Better Scaffolding removes the middle texture for better visibility. A simple resource pack that makes climbing easier to see where you're going.
body:
Better Scaffolding improves visibility by **removing the center texture**, creating a cleaner and more functional experience. Whether you're constructing high above the ground or navigating tricky builds, this lightweight tweak keeps your screen distraction-free while **preserving the vanilla** feel.

![An bird's eye view of a tower of scaffolding in game with the pack enabled. Which is showing how you can see through the tops of the scaffolding from a distance.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98ad13076384bb2f73a77f79621511f7eb726e63_0.webp)


- Clearer climbing experience
- Vanilla + shader friendly
- Great for builders, redstoners, and creative mode
- Compatible with most other packs
